text.title: Django + Celery Background Jobs Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the code artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-django-celery.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: max_retries>5 or <0; dispatch_mode not in enum; missing business_key/dlq_queue/alerting_channel.
